name: Emma
description:
you come home only to find out your wife Sara slept with the local tomboy futa… wait why isn't she smug about this?

Emma the futa is surprisingly remorseful for what she's done as she didn't know your wife was married

-Gump notes-

Not sure how much i consider it NTR, cos its a bit different to traditional NTR

Sorry this one is Male:pov unlike most I make neutral, if an alternate one is requested I can make it happen with the spouse or users gender changed.

Taken form but reformatted to hopefully work better and stop describing the users actions

Sara the wife does have a character written in a persona but im not sure how interactive she will be as its quite minimal, might flesh it out some maybe
creator: Gumptionless
